papers: 地下车站洪水脆弱性级联效应分析

entries.closest_overlap: natural-language GIS interaction and spatial intent decomposition
entries.our_difference: FusionAgent ends in executable fusion artifacts, run-level evidence, and bounded runtime stages rather than interactive GIS responses alone
entries.borrowed_idea: spatial intent decomposition and graph-aware retrieval
entries.non_comparable_boundary: FusionAgent should not be reframed as a general GIS copilot or UX-first assistant

entries.closest_overlap: schema-aware deterministic verification and structured failure reasoning
entries.our_difference: FusionAgent couples verification with executable planning, healing, and artifact evidence instead of stopping at query correctness
entries.borrowed_idea: machine-readable error metadata and deterministic verification loops
entries.non_comparable_boundary: the thesis should not collapse into text-to-query evaluation only

entries.closest_overlap: ontology-grounded reasoning constraints and digression prevention
entries.our_difference: FusionAgent binds KG structure to executable task, algorithm, and output contracts rather than an ontology reasoning layer alone
entries.borrowed_idea: ontology-grounded rejection and bounded reasoning discipline
entries.non_comparable_boundary: do not expand into a broad ontology-engineering thesis

entries.our_difference: FusionAgent adds bounded execution, healing, and evidence writeback after retrieval instead of stopping at path ranking
entries.non_comparable_boundary: do not add expensive multi-round self-dialogue just to resemble path-search literature

entries.our_difference: FusionAgent centers on executable geospatial fusion outputs, not report or QA endpoints
entries.borrowed_idea: dual-channel retrieval summaries and structured extraction patterns
entries.non_comparable_boundary: do not shift the runtime into a text QA or generic GraphRAG system

entries.paper: 地下车站洪水脆弱性级联效应分析
entries.closest_overlap: facility dependency and flood cascade reasoning for disaster scenarios
entries.our_difference: FusionAgent contributes a bounded scenario runtime and evidence contract rather than a domain-specific simulation stack
entries.borrowed_idea: bounded facility dependency and cascade reasoning for scenario profiles
entries.non_comparable_boundary: do not turn the scenario layer into a full digital-twin simulation platform
entries.citation_role: domain motivation and bounded future-direction reference
